caption: A man with a tall, spiked silver wig and glasses is seated in a recording studio, speaking into a professional microphone. He is wearing a white shirt, a red bowtie, and light-colored suspenders, with black headphones over his ears. The background is a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs. To his right, a clothing rack is partially visible, featuring a shirt with the word "LEE" printed on it. A red and white logo appearing as "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is superimposed on the image. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position and attire, speaking with slight movements of his head and mouth, while the camera angle and lighting remain constant.
